channel.title: Naija Digest Online
channel.description: Nigeria’s one-stop hub for breaking news, tech, football, celebrity gossip, Naija music, live TV, exchange rates and trending topics.

item.title: Papers: EU lawmakers call for investigation into Balogun 'scandal'

item.description: The top stories and transfer rumours from Friday's newspapers...

item.title: 2027: Guber Aspirant Says Crisis Won’t Stop Kwara APC Victory At The Poll
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: Renown neurosurgeon and gubernatorial aspirant of the All Progressives Congress (APC) in Kwara State, Prof. Wale Sulaiman on Thursday allayed fears that the grievances trailing the party’s governorship primary could affect its chances in the 2027 general elections. Sulaiman maintained that th

item.title: US star Stevenson signs with Zuffa Boxing
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: Shakur Stevenson has signed with new promotional powerhouse Zuffa Boxing.

item.title: RFLD launches organisational resilience programme to equip 500 African nonprofits with free donor-ready management system

item.description: The programme is designed to strengthen the operational resilience of nonprofits by helping them establish the systems and controls increasingly required by donors, development partners, and grant-making institutions. The post RFLD launches organisational resilience programme to equip 500 African no

item.title: Governors, Senators Clash Over State Police Amid Funding, Abuse Fears
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: Some state governors and senators have disagreed over the proposed establishment of state police, with funding and the potential for political abuse emerging as major concerns. The differing views were expressed on Thursday at the THISDAY/ARISE Television town hall meeting on Building a National Con

item.title: APC govt has no plan to release El-Rufai — Bolaji Abdullahi
item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: Abdullahi accused the Tinubu administration of abandoning governance to focus solely on the 2027 elections, while millions of Nigerians battle hunger and insecurity. The post APC govt has no plan to release El-Rufai — Bolaji Abdullahi appeared first on Tribune Online.

item.title: Mbappe on target as France beat Morocco, head to World Cup semi-finals
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: Kylian Mbappe opened the scoring on the hour mark before Ousmane Dembele notched the second six minutes later to send the French into a semi-final against either Spain or Belgium. The post Mbappe on target as France beat Morocco, head to World Cup semi-finals appeared first on Vanguard News.

item.title: World Cup: France Ease Past Morocco To Book Semi-Final Berth
item.dc:creator: The Whistler
item.description: France produced a professional display to defeat Morocco 2-0 and secure a place in the semi-finals of the FIFA World Cup after a contest that was goalless at the interval before Kylian Mbappe and Ousmane Dembele struck in the second half to settle the quarter-final. The match kicked off in Massachus

item.title: 2026 World Cup: France becomes first team to qualify for semi-finals
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: France have become the first country to book their place in the semi-finals of the 2026 World Cup. Les Bleus beat Morocco 2-0 on Thursday evening to qualify for the last four. Kylian Mbappe missed the chance to give his team the lead in the first half, before opening the scoring in the second half.

item.title: World Cup: Mbappé, Dembélé fire France into third straight semi-final
item.dc:creator: The Sun
item.description: France booked their place in a third consecutive FIFA World Cup semi-final after second-half goals from Kylian Mbappé and Ousmane Dembélé sealed a convincing 2-0 victory over Morocco in Thursday's quarter-final at Boston Stadium. The post World Cup: Mbappé, Dembélé fire France into third straight se

item.title: [UPDATED] Mbappe, Dembele Score As France Beat Morocco 2-0, Move Into World Cup Semi-Finals

item.description: The result end Morocco's spirited campaign and keeps France on course for a third World Cup title. The post [UPDATED] Mbappe, Dembele Score As France Beat Morocco 2-0, Move Into World Cup Semi-Finals appeared first on Channels Television.

item.title: BREAKING: France Defeat Morocco 2-0 In World Cup Quarter Final
item.dc:creator: TVC News
item.description: Former World Champions, France, have defeated the Atlas Lions of Morocco 2-0 to love into the Semi Final of the World Cup. The post BREAKING: France Defeat Morocco 2-0 In World Cup Quarter Final appeared first on Trending News.

item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: The PDP governorship candidate in Ogun, Oladipupo Adebutu on Wednesday received a hero’s welcome, when thousands of Yewa indigenes, Ogun West senatorial district, trooped out to receive and endorse his governorship bid. The indigenes, including a huge crowd of PDP faithful in Yewa, said it is

item.title: Oil Steady at End of Volatile Week as Traders Assess Iran Risks
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description: Oil steadied at the end of a bumpy week as traders assessed the risk to flows from a flare-up in fighting between Iran and the US.

item.title: OpenAI is shutting down Atlas, but its AI browser ambitions are still growing
item.dc:creator: TechCrunch
item.description: OpenAI is sunsetting its AI-powered browser after less than a year. But it's moving some agentic browsing features to its desktop app and a Chrome extension.

item.description: The Social Democratic Party, (SDP), has charged its state and national leaders to begin immediate grassroots mobilisation, strengthen party structures, and maintain discipline ahead of the 2027 general elections. The party’s National chairman, prof. Sadiq Gombe made the call during the

item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: Nigeria's solid minerals sector generated more than ₦70 billion in federation revenue in 2025, marking a significant increase from The post Solid minerals revenue surges to over N70bn amid sector reforms appeared first on Tribune Online.

item.description: Clashing interpretations of vague memorandum of understanding language on Hormuz at heart of escalation, analysts say.

item.description: He would have turned 70 on August 25 which would have also signalled his retirement in line with the Catholic Church's doctrine. The post Catholic Archbishop of Benin dies one month before retirement appeared first on Vanguard News.

item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets

item.title: Mbappé Misses Penalty As Morocco Hold France At Half-Time
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: France and Morocco remain deadlocked at 0-0 at half-time in their FIFA World Cup quarter-final after a tense opening 45 minutes in Foxborough. The biggest moment of the first half came in the 28th minute when France were awarded a penalty, only for captain Kylian Mbappé to fail to convert, allowing

item.title: UK finally pardons Ruth Ellis, 70 years after execution
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: The United Kingdom authorities have approved a posthumous amnesty for Ruth Ellis, more than 70 years after she was hanged for homicide. The deceased had been convicted of murder after a trial and executed on 13 July 1955 for shooting and killing David Blakely on 10 April 1955. The conditional pardon

item.title: Investors gain N962bn as Nigeria’s stock market extends winning streak for fifth straight time
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: Nigeria’s stock market maintained its bullish momentum on Thursday, with investors gaining N962 billion as equities closed higher for the fifth consecutive trading session. The sustained rally pushed the market capitalisation up by 0.62 per cent, rising from N155.585 trillion at the start of t

item.description: Speedcube is an open-source platform for speedcubers featuring a Rubik's Cube solver, competition timer, algorithm library, and AI-assisted cube recognition directly in the browser.Built with React, TypeScript, Rust, and Python, the project aims to become an all-in-one platform for cubers—from begin

item.dc:creator: TVC News

item.title: Show HN: RandoFont – A browser for Google Fonts
item.dc:creator: Hacker News
item.description:
Inevitably when starting a new web project I want to pick the perfect font. This is just a browser that shows Google Fonts, randomly, and lets me tag favorites.I built this years ago and just used AI to give it a minor facelift.
Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48852144 Points: 12

item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: Iranian state media reported Thursday that a US-Israeli projectile hit military headquarters on the outskirts of Bushehr, hours after clashes between the United States and Iran flared. The post Iran says projectile hit military base near Bushehr appeared first on Vanguard News.

item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description: SK Hynix Inc. raised $26.5 billion in its American depositary share offering, as the South Korean memory chipmaker powered through volatility to deliver the largest ever US first-time share sale by a foreign company.

item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: Harry Brook and Phil Salt's 146-run partnership saw England dish out a nine-wicket trouncing of India in Bristol to cruise to a T20 series victory with a game to spare.

item.title: The ChatGPT browser is already dead
item.dc:creator: The Verge
item.description: OpenAI is already shutting down ChatGPT Atlas, its browser that could do tasks for you on your behalf, less than a year after launching it. Atlas was announced in October, but as part of its wave of news about ChatGPT Work today, the company confirmed that it will be "sunsetting" Atlas and is target

item.title: The floatable, powerful Soundcore Boom 2 speaker is over half off
item.dc:creator: The Verge
item.description: Bluetooth speakers with big sound and great features are hard to find for under $100, with most offerings being some variation of the same basic (and often small) design. Thankfully, through July 10th Woot has the Anker Soundcore Boom 2 on sale for $69.99, which is $20 cheaper than the discounted pr

item.title: UNIOSUN records global history, wins prestigious Hult Prize Award
item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: Despite participating for the first time, UNIOSUN distinguished itself by establishing a vibrant Hult Prize ecosystem that fostered innovation and entrepreneurship across its six campuses.

item.title: Residents Hail Kaduna Road Projects, Seek Lasting Infrastructure Solutions
item.dc:creator: Channels TV
item.description: The Kaduna Roads Agency assured residents that the roads were being constructed to durable standards. The post Residents Hail Kaduna Road Projects, Seek Lasting Infrastructure Solutions appeared first on Channels Television.

item.title: ‘Our family is broken beyond repair’: My brother took over my parents’ finances. What can I do?
item.dc:creator: MarketWatch
item.description: “Without telling me, my brother petitioned for sole guardianship of our mother.”

item.title: Tinubu Meets Service Chiefs Behind Closed Doors At State House
item.dc:creator: TVC News
item.description: President Bola Tinubu on Thursday presided over a closed-door security meeting at the Presidential Villa, Abuja, with the country's top military commanders, intelligence chiefs and security advisers. The post Tinubu Meets Service Chiefs Behind Closed Doors At State House appeared first on Trending N

item.title: UN 'deeply concerned' by ongoing drone attack in Sudan
item.dc:creator: France 24
item.description: In tonight's edition, the ICC is laying down the groundwork for investigations into some of the atrocities of Sudan's brutal war. Also, rights workers, politicians, developers, and more are currently in Geneva for the AI for Good Summit. And South African artist Credo V. Daniel's music is removed f

item.title: World Cup: ATFrenchies share their France-Morocco predictions
item.dc:creator: France 24
item.description:
⚽ 🏆 Alexandre Durand and Tom Carles, the duo that make up AT Frenchies, are showing their support for France's #LesBleus as they face #Morocco in the first quarter final at the FIFA World Cup.
🇫🇷 🇲🇦 Who do they think will win? They share their analysis with FRANCE 24 ▶️
